title: Robot Talk Episode 152 – Dexterous robot hands, with Rich Walker
title_zh: Robot Talk Episode 152 – Dexterous robot hands, with Rich Walker
abstract: Claire chatted to Rich Walker from Shadow Robot Company about their advanced robotic hands for research and industry. Rich Walker has been at Shadow Robot since long before it was a company, working initially on software and systems engineering before “jumping the fence” into management. He led Shadow Robot’s engagement with a number of R&D […]
